title: local-signing: RSA private key cloned without zeroization
description: secretx-local-signing/src/lib.rs sign() clones the RsaPrivateKey for signing. rsa::RsaPrivateKey does not implement Zeroize, so this clone allocates raw key material on the heap with no guarantee of being zeroed on drop. Trigger: every RSA-PSS sign() call → untracked copy of private key bytes accumulates in heap, may be swapped or appear in core dumps. Undermines the stated design goal of minimizing key material exposure.
